name: Spicy Peanut Chicken
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces chicken breast, skinned and boned
1 1/2 teaspoons corn, safflower, or canola oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice onion.
2. Wash and dry chicken breasts and rub with cumin and cinnamon on both sides.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet and sauté onion and chicken in hot oil until the chicken is browned on both sides.
4. Wash plum tomatoes and cut into large chunks. Halve jalapeno and remove seeds; reserve half for another use. Cut jalapeno into 2 or 3 pieces.
5. Add pepper through feed tube. Open processor and add plum tomatoes, lemon juice, peanut butter, garlic, and puree. Process to blend well.
6. When chicken is browned on both sides, pour the sauce over. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer about 5-7 minutes until chicken is cooked.
7. Prepare cilantro leaves. Spoon some of the sauce over rice and garnish with cilantro.
